name: constitutional-governance
description: Phase-gated constitutional enforcement adapted from CORE framework. Immutable authority hierarchy + deterministic rule enforcement across all agent transitions.

capabilities.phase_enforcement: Enforce PLAN→EXECUTE→VERIFY→DELIVER phase gates on all agent tasks
capabilities.authority_immutability: System instructions cannot be overridden by user/agent prompts — hardcoded
capabilities.rule_engine: HARD_RULES block output, SOFT_RULES warn, CONSTITUTION injected per-agent
capabilities.cross_cutting_invariants: INV-1 through INV-8 enforced on ALL state transitions
capabilities.governance_score: GCR (Governance Compliance Rate) computed per run

rules: Zero LLM for governance decisions — deterministic only
Constitution is ~50 tokens, injected into every agent context
Authority hierarchy: System > Constitution > Operator > Agent
All governance events logged to JSONL for audit
